description: An analyst must mitigate a Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attack that is overwhelming a public-facing military website.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge alerts of high traffic and server unavailability for the website.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst confirms the symptoms of a DDoS attack.

nodes.task_description: Analyze incoming traffic to identify the characteristics of the attack (e.g., source countries, traffic type).

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the nature of the malicious traffic.

nodes.task_description: Engage a cloud-based DDoS mitigation service to scrub the malicious traffic before it reaches the website.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully reroutes traffic through the scrubbing service, restoring website availability.
